prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-HLLW-LEATHPUNCH-6PC-TT Product Type: HOLE_PUNCH Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux Carbon Steel Punch Set Leather Working Tools, 6pc Description: The ToolTreaux 6pc Universal Heavy Duty Leather Hollow Punch Artisan Crafter Tool Set is ideal for leather working and for making clean holes in tough materials such as leather, plastic, rubber, vinyl and other thick fabrics.

Each unit is 3.5" in length, constructed from heavy duty hardened carbon steel (45-48 HRC), and feature knurled body construction for a secure grip when in use. This leather working tool set it not only great for working with fabrics but can be used for other craft and hobby projects too. The set is handy to have for customization or repairing belts, shoes, purses and handbags, jackets and more.

Punch sizes include with this 6pc set are: 5/16 inch (8mm), 1/4 inch (6.5mm), 7/32 inch (5.5mm), 3/16 inch (5mm), 5/32 inch (4mm) and 1/8 inch (3mm). Search Terms: leather repair kit for furniture handmade homemade handbags purses shoes belts fabric vinyl leatherworking tools artisan craft and hobby art supplies DIY grommet tool kit Features: - 6PC PUNCH SET: The ToolTreaux 6pc punch set is ideal for leather working and for making clean holes in tough materials such as leather, plastic, rubber, vinyl and other thick fabrics - LEATHER REPAIR KIT: The 6pc leather hollow punch set is also handy to have on hand for customization and for repairing belts, shoes, purses and handbags, jackets and even furniture - CARBON STEEL MATERIAL: Each punch is 3.5 inches in length, constructed from heavy duty hardened carbon steel (45-48 HRC), and feature knurled body construction for durable longevity and ease of use when handling - HOLLOW PUNCH SIZES INCLUDED: 5/16 inch (8mm), 1/4 inch (6.5mm), 7/32 inch (5.5mm), 3/16 inch (5mm), 5/32 inch (4mm) and 1/8 inch (3mm) - SPECIFICATIONS: Overall Dimensions: 9 x 6 x 1 inches; Color: Silver; Weight: 0.2lbs; Material: Carbon Steel === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux 6-pc Carbon Steel Leather Hollow Punch Set

openai.item_name: ToolTreaux 6-pc Carbon Steel Leather Punch Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: Heavy Duty Hardened Carbon Steel, Knurled Grip, 6 Sizes Included, Leather Repair And Crafting, Durable And Long-Lasting

openai.title_differentiation: Hollow Punch Sizes 18 Inch To 516 Inch, Hardened Carbon Steel, Knurled Grip, Leather Vinyl Rubber, 6 Piece Set
